mapper.select:
SELECT ITEM_CD as itemCd, PLANT_CD as plantCd, ITEM_NM as itemNm, ITEM_SPEC as itemSpec, ITEM_TYPE as itemType, ITEM_GRP as itemGrp, UNIT as unit, USE_YN as useYn FROM MST_ITEM WHERE 1=1
AND (ITEM_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemNm}, '%') OR ITEM_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemNm}, '%'))
AND USE_YN = #{useYn}
ORDER BY ITEM_NM ASC

SELECT ITEM_CD as itemCd, PLANT_CD as plantCd, ITEM_NM as itemNm, ITEM_SPEC as itemSpec, ITEM_TYPE as itemType, ITEM_GRP as itemGrp, UNIT as unit, USE_YN as useYn FROM MST_ITEM WHERE ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}
mapper.update: UPDATE MST_ITEM SET ITEM_NM = #{itemNm}, PLANT_CD = #{plantCd}, ITEM_SPEC = #{itemSpec}, ITEM_TYPE = #{itemType}, ITEM_GRP = #{itemGrp}, UNIT = #{unit}, USE_YN = #{useYn} WHERE ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}
